title: 4 Sizes 6 Pairs Vampire Fangs Fake Teeth with Adhesive Tooth Kits for Kids Adult Halloween Party Cosplay Prop Decoration Vampire Teeth White Horror 13mm, 15mm, 17mm 19mm - Party Dress Up Accessories
features: Halloween Vampire Teeth - Made of safe resin, set of 6 different sizes vampire teeth for your choice. 1x13mm, 2x15mm, 2x17mm and 1x19mm. With safe teeth adhesive. Each size of teeth can meet your different needs for Halloween costume party.

Easy to Use - Put the teeth adhesive beads into hot water let them from white to clear, then scoop them out and press onto fake fangs to make a mold, then press the fake fang on your own teeth for a while (the adhesive beads cool very quickly, so you need to handle them quickly).

Portable to Carry - Each pair of packed in a small transparent box, then all in the box easy to carry and store the Halloween party fake fangs and make vampire dentures reusable for many times. Rinse thoroughly with soap and warm water before use.

Vampire Fangs for Cosplay - Vampire fangs can meet your needs for different characters, such as vampires, werewolves and zombies. Ideal decorations for your party cosplay. It is best gifts for your family and friends.

Halloween Makeup Accessories - These cosplay vampire fangs can create the infinite joy for you. For your makeup, especially good for Halloween parties. NOTE: it is best not to wear it to eat and sleep, to avoid the risk of swallowing.
description: Product Description Multiple Size Options Four sizes available (13mm, 15mm, 17mm, 19mm) to fit users of different ages and tooth sizes, ensuring a comfortable fit. High-quality Materials Made from premium materials that ensure comfortable wear and long-lasting use. Realistic Appearance Realistic design that blends naturally with your teeth, creating a perfect horror effect for a more vivid Halloween costume. Includes Adhesive Tooth Kits Each set of fake teeth comes with adhesive tooth kits, making them easy to shape and secure for convenient use. Halloween Parties Essential for Halloween parties, these vampire fangs help you transform effortlessly and impress everyone. Cosplay Events Ideal for cosplay events or filming horror-themed videos, these vampire fangs add realism and fun to your performance. More Halloween-Themed Products.
